_comment: Content-flag retry e2e (#881). Two sequential responses keyed on model + sequenceIndex (no userMessage, so it's decoupled from any LLM-recorded prompt). seedream_v5 is used ONLY by the content-retry spec, so these never interfere with other specs. Attempt 0 returns a 422 content-checker rejection; the SAME-model retry (attempt 1) succeeds. The fal client does NOT retry 422s (retryable codes are 429/502/503/504), so the two attempts consume sequenceIndex 0 then 1 exactly. The 422 body is the OpenAI-style { error: { message } } that aimock emits; extractFalErrorMessage reads body.error.message, and isContentRejectionError matches 'content checker'.

error.message: The content could not be processed because it contained material flagged by a content checker.
